_provenance.note: LIVE cross-family Groq gpt-oss-120b DOMAIN judge over the gold set. Metrics on the territory (gate-passing + faithful) subset (R-DCAL-1); per-dimension reported (R-DCAL-2). All gold positives are SYNTHETIC/planted (R-DCAL-4). Held-out = the 'test' split (R-DCAL-7). Directional until the ~100 floor (R-DHON-1); over-promise (§4.2) marginal-value vs the LIVE faithfulness judge is partial — see docs/domain-calibration-status.md.
